meta.title: Shintokuyama Ski Area
meta.description: Hidden JAPOW beside Tomamu & Sahoro — 7-min station walk · ¥2,000 all day.

hero.eyebrow: Shintoku, Hokkaido · walk from JR Shintoku
hero.title:
Shintokuyama
Ski Area
hero.tagline: Monopolize 32-degree uncompacted local powder at this hidden ¥2,000 gem near Sahoro and Tomamu.

live.subtitle: Snow, lifts, and hours at a glance

sanctuary.title:
Beside Tomamu,
empty 32° runs.
sanctuary.lead: Minutes from Hoshino Tomamu and Sahoro Resort yet ¥2,000 per day and a 7-minute walk from the station—escape mega-resort prices and crowds with smart powder hunting.
sanctuary.noticeBody: The locally cut "Onodera burn" is the signature steep powder zone—simple facilities, but skiers come for snow quality and value.

primary.title: 32° × ¥2,000 × 7-min walk
primary.lead: Three reasons to visit: 7-minute station walk, ¥2,000 all day, and 32-degree uncompacted powder—an easy day trip from Tomamu or Sahoro.
primary.imgAlt: Fresh powder on a compact municipal hill

secondary.title: Near Tomamu · Sahoro
secondary.lead: A short drive from Hoshino Tomamu and Sahoro Resort—stay at the mega-resort, ski here on a day trip.

pass.title:
¥2,000 all day,
7 min from the station.
pass.lead: Adult 8-hour ticket: ¥2,000. About a 7-minute walk from JR Shintoku—an easy day trip while staying at Tomamu or Sahoro. Check snow and lift status at the top of this page before you go.

hike.title:
After 16:00,
soba · onsen.
hike.lead: Lifts close at 16:00. Show your ticket stub for discounts at local soba shops and onsen (when offered). After skiing, head into town for soba and a soak.
hike.leadCurry: Minatoya · Sekiguchi soba, Kuttarri Onsen Lake Inn, Tokachi Shintoku Onsen Waka—classic post-ski stops.

tour.title:
From Shintoku Stn.,
half a day.
tour.lead: Day trip from Tomamu/Sahoro or stay in town—ski, eat soba, soak onsen in one Tokachi loop.

sanctuary.title: Hidden JAPOW guide
sanctuary.body: Right beside Tomamu and Sahoro—¥2,000, uncrowded, 32-degree local powder for a full day.

workation.title: JAPOW workation base
workation.body: Use lodge Wi-Fi—morning powder, afternoon remote work. Shintoku as a workation base in Tokachi.

lake.title: Tomamu · Sahoro pairing
lake.body: Stay at Tomamu or Sahoro, ski at Shintokuyama—a split-stay trip that cuts cost and crowds.

access.note: JR Nemuro Line Shintoku Stn. ~7 min walk · Doto Expwy Tomamu IC · lodge parking
access.rentacarEyebrow: トマム・サホロ近接のHidden JAPOW
access.rentacarLink: 新千歳空港でレンタカー予約
access.rentacarNote: スカイチケット（外部サイト）
